text:
Dependence - Full staff performance of activity during entire 7 days, 8 = Activity did not occur during entire 7 days.
86 G1HB G1HB_SUPP_EAT 23cB(G1hB)Eating - Support Provided CHAR 1 Indicates how the patient with support provided eats and drinks, regardless of skill. -1 = Unknown, 0 = No setup or physical help from staff, 1 = Setup help only, 2 = One person physical assist, 3 = Two+ person physical assist, 8 = ADL activity itself did not occur during entire 7 days
87 G1IA G1IA_SELF_TOLIET
